name: campus-one-backend
description: Campus One centralized NestJS backend monorepo

scripts.smoke:gateway: cross-env NODE_ENV=test SUPABASE_URL=https://campus-one-test.supabase.co SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=test-anon-key SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=test-service-role-key TENANT_REGISTRY_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/tenant_registry?schema=public IDENTITY_ACCESS_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/identity_access?schema=public ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/smoke-gateway.ts
scripts.smoke:core: cross-env NODE_ENV=test SUPABASE_URL=https://campus-one-test.supabase.co SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=test-anon-key SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=test-service-role-key TENANT_REGISTRY_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/tenant_registry?schema=public IDENTITY_ACCESS_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/identity_access?schema=public ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/smoke-core-flows.ts
scripts.security:routes: cross-env NODE_ENV=test SUPABASE_URL=https://campus-one-test.supabase.co SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=test-anon-key SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=test-service-role-key TENANT_REGISTRY_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/tenant_registry?schema=public IDENTITY_ACCESS_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/identity_access?schema=public ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/route-security-matrix.ts
scripts.prisma:ci: npm run prisma:validate && npm run prisma:migrations:check && npm run prisma:generate && npm run security:audit
scripts.verify: npm run contracts:check && npm run routes:check && npm run schema:check && npm run seed:beta-demo:test && npm run prisma:ci && npm test && npm run build && npm run runtime:check && npm run smoke:gateway && npm run smoke:core && npm run security:routes
